Selected video work

Video Gallery

These projects were created for organisations including Mercator Ocean, ECMWF, ESA, EUMETSAT, and DLR. They combine editorial storytelling, motion design, and science communication to make complex environmental and space data more accessible.

Most entries below are embedded directly from YouTube, so you can watch them in place while scanning the title, date, client, and short description.

01

SpaceUp LIVE #PreparingForSpace HESpace sponsor talk

2021-04-23

This sponsor talk introduces HE Space through Agnieszka Iwanczuk’s background in recruitment, people-focused work, and candidate preparation.

recruitment
↗View

02

Loretta Whitesides Keynote #SpaceUpLive

2021-04-16

Loretta Whitesides shares a keynote about space exploration, leadership, and the belief that seemingly impossible goals can become reality.

space exploration
↗View

03

SpaceUp LIVE #PreparingForSpace panel

2021-04-06

This panel explores how satellites, rovers, and humans are prepared for space exploration, covering mission design, testing, operations, astronaut training, and launch readiness.

PreparingForSpace
↗View

04

SpaceUp LIVE #4 - #PreparingForSpace

2021-04-01

This edition of SpaceUp LIVE focused on #PreparingForSpace and brought together the community for online talks and discussion.

PreparingForSpace
↗View

05

Mercator Ocean - Ocean State Report 4 summary

2020-12-15
Mercator Ocean

We worked with Mercator Ocean on the communication strategy for its annual Ocean State Report.

ocean state report
↗View

06

SpaceUp LIVE #3 - World Space Week Edition

2020-10-07

This World Space Week edition of SpaceUp LIVE offered an open online programme for talks, discussions, and community participation around space topics.

SpaceUp LIVE
↗View

07

#3 - Investment in Space

2020-07-23

This episode examines investment in the space sector, including startup funding, commercialisation, and the shift toward private-sector leadership.

space investment
↗View

08

#2 - Space Clusters Across Europe

2020-07-02

This episode looks at how European space clusters support startups, collaboration, and regional growth across the wider space ecosystem.

space clusters
↗View

09

SpaceUp LIVE #2

2020-06-24

This second SpaceUp LIVE event continued the online unconference format with talks on virtual community, microgravity, Mars analog stations, satellite tracking, and NewSpace in Africa.

SpaceUp LIVE
↗View

10

#1 - Commercial Opportunities for Human Spaceflight in Europe

2020-06-18

This episode explores how Europe is building commercial opportunities in human spaceflight, from access to the International Space Station to new services in low Earth orbit.

human spaceflight
↗View

11

Mercator Ocean - SROCC social media video

2020-06-10
Mercator Ocean

The Copernicus Marine Environment Monitoring Service (CMEMS) managed by Mercator Ocean provides full, free and open access to data & information related to our ocean.

CMEMS
↗View

Copernicus ECMWF - CAMS Windy

2020-06-03
Copernicus ECMWF

Design & Data worked with Copernicus ECMWF to communicate case studies, which demonstrate the impact and benefits of Copernicus for service users and European citizens.

SpaceUp LIVE #1

2020-04-29

The first SpaceUp LIVE brought together a global online space unconference with talks, discussions, and a panel on how COVID-19 could affect the space industry.

ECMWF - Vortex - European State of the Climate event 10.04.2018

2018-06-06
ECMWF

A series of videos highlighting different use cases were shown to the European Parliament at the European State of the Climate event on 10 April 2018 to illustrate the important role data from Copernicus services implemented by ECMWF: CAMS and C3S.

ECMWF

ESA - Living with space 4.0

European Space Agency

EUMETSAT and Africa: An Overview

2016-12-12
EUMETSAT

27

EUMETSAT and Africa: Food Security

EUMETSAT

28

Rosetta Strato Charity Campaign

2016-10-21
Universe Awareness (UNAWE)

We want to help continue Rosetta's legacy, by sharing her heroic story, using the plush toy as an interactive teaching resource to educate school children around the world in astronomy and space sciences.

Rosetta
↗View

29

ESA - Making and testing for Mercury

2016-09-06
European Space Agency

The ESA-JAXA BepiColombo mission to Mercury must withstand extremely harsh conditions while in orbit around the innermost planet of our Solar System.

ESA
↗View

30

ESA - Securing Aeolus against atomic oxygen

2016-08-12
European Space Agency

Low-orbiting space missions can be susceptible to atomic oxygen erosion.

ESA
↗View

31

ESA - Getting Vega’s launch tower moving

2016-08-12
European Space Agency

Once its mobile launch gantry is moved away, then Europe’s Vega launcher is primed for lift-off – except for the time the stuck gantry refused to move.

ESA
↗View

32

Rosetta Plush Toy Reaches Stratosphere

2016-08-09

We asked ourselves, could the Rosetta toy also survive the harsh conditions of space?

Rosetta
↗View

33

ESOcast 64: First Ring System Around Asteroid

2014-03-26

Observations from South America, including ESO’s La Silla Observatory, revealed that the asteroid Chariklo is surrounded by two narrow rings, making it the smallest known object with rings and only the fifth body in the Solar System known to have this feature.

asteroid
↗View

34

ESA - Securing Aeolus against atomic oxygen - Subtitled

Low-orbiting space missions can be susceptible to atomic oxygen erosion.

ESA
